top_findings.summary: The skill uses Claude Vision API for visual element analysis in desktop mode, which involves uploading screenshots to a third-party server (Anthropic). This is not prominently disclosed in the primary skill description and occurs during recording (Phase 2) before interactive redaction (Phase 3), potentially exposing sensitive data without user consent. While element identification is necessary for documentation, uploading images externally violates data minimization principles, as local alternatives or clearer opt-in mechanisms should be prioritized.
